title: Formatting Public Document Titles
excerpt:
When a public version of a Monday document is created. The title has a different font and format compared to the rest of the document. This can not be changed or formatted in any customisable way.

posts.author: Melad.Ameri (Melad Ameri)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a public version of a Monday document is created. The title has a different font and format compared to the rest of the document. This can not be changed or formatted in any customisable way.

Please could this be added as a feature where the user can have the same customisations that are present when adding the document contents.
